name: edit-file
description: Apply a targeted edit to an existing file using a search-and-replace diff. Safer than write-file for partial changes.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to edit

diff.description: The exact text to find and replace, in unified diff format or as a search→replace pair

search.description: The exact string to search for in the file (alternative to diff)

replace.description: The string to replace the search match with (used with search)

path.description: The resolved path that was edited
